text: The reading of a combustible gas indicator indicates the percentage of the

options.text: lower explosive limit of a flammable gas concentration
upper explosive limit of a flammable gas concentration
concentration of flammable gas in a compartment
concentration by weight of nonflammable gas in a compartment

explanation: A combustible gas indicator typically provides readings as a percentage of the Lower Explosive Limit (LEL), indicating how close the current gas concentration is to forming an explosive mixture.
